name: The Swing Lab
address: 100 Sterling Pkwy suite g17, Mechanicsburg, PA 17050
about: The Swing Doc is a golf training facility located in Mechanicsburg, PA, offering certified PGA Associate instruction. The venue provides a range of coaching options including private lessons, on-course instruction, and simulator-based sessions. They focus on structured, personalized coaching to help golfers improve their swing fundamentals, course strategy, and overall game performance. The facility is equipped with simulator rentals and operates with a patient, results-driven approach suitable for golfers of all ages and abilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized PGA instruction tailored to individual goals
Flexible lesson options including private, on-course, and simulator sessions
Patient, results-driven approach focused on measurable improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs for lessons and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, but BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Session times vary, but private lessons are typically tailored to your needs, and on-site simulator sessions are 2 hours long.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue explicitly mentions welcoming junior golfers and players of all ages.
